namespace OpenTelemetry.SemanticConventions;

/// <summary>
/// Constants for metric names and descriptors outlined by the OpenTelemetry specifications.
/// </summary>
static partial class HttpServerMetrics
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Number of active HTTP server requests.
    /// </summary>
    public const string MetricHttpServerActiveRequests = "http.server.active_requests";

    /// <summary>
    /// Size of HTTP server request bodies.
    /// </summary>
    public const string MetricHttpServerRequestBodySize = "http.server.request.body.size";

    /// <summary>
    /// Duration of HTTP server requests.
    /// </summary>
    public const string MetricHttpServerRequestDuration = "http.server.request.duration";

    /// <summary>
    /// Size of HTTP server response bodies.
    /// </summary>
    public const string MetricHttpServerResponseBodySize = "http.server.response.body.size";

    /// <summary>
    /// Number of active HTTP server requests.
    /// </summary>
    public static partial class HttpServerActiveRequestsDescriptor
    {
        public const string Name = "http.server.active_requests";
        public const string Unit = "{request}";
        public const string Instrument = "updowncounter";
        public const string Brief = "Number of active HTTP server requests.";
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Size of HTTP server request bodies.
    /// </summary>
    public static partial class HttpServerRequestBodySizeDescriptor
    {
        public const string Name = "http.server.request.body.size";
        public const string Unit = "By";
        public const string Instrument = "histogram";
        public const string Brief = "Size of HTTP server request bodies.";
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Duration of HTTP server requests.
    /// </summary>
    public static partial class HttpServerRequestDurationDescriptor
    {
        public const string Name = "http.server.request.duration";
        public const string Unit = "s";
        public const string Instrument = "histogram";
        public const string Brief = "Duration of HTTP server requests.";
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Size of HTTP server response bodies.
    /// </summary>
    public static partial class HttpServerResponseBodySizeDescriptor
    {
        public const string Name = "http.server.response.body.size";
        public const string Unit = "By";
        public const string Instrument = "histogram";
        public const string Brief = "Size of HTTP server response bodies.";
    }
}
